label: Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins

node.label: Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
node.definition: Scientific machine learning and digital twins combine physical models, learned surrogates, observations, uncertainty, and simulation for prediction or control.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins is modeled as depending on Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data and feeding downstream nodes such as Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting, Drug discovery, protein & molecular design, Autonomous research & AI scientist systems.
